creator: Carpetsmoker@rwxrwxrwx.net
text:
Giving up maintainership of all my ports:
carpetsmoker@rwxrwxrwx.net
carpetsmoker@xs4all.nl

Please set it to people who submit broken patches, that seems to be the policy these days.

Also remove my master sites (xs4all.nl/~tournoij/, rwxrwxrwx.net, carpetsmoker.net), they no longer work anyway.

How-To-Repeat: The problem:
http://marc.info/?t=124769294700004&r=1&w=2
